title: We're working on a Community Facelift

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Important information about the monday.com Community

Some of you may have noticed an increase in activity here in the community over the last few days.

We want to update you that these efforts are a part of something larger and very exciting.

We’re working to improve & refresh the monday.com Community, including:

  • A fresh new look
  • Better organization and navigation within categories using sub-categories
  • Better moderation of your questions ensuring you get answers and quickly

The official relaunch will take place in the upcoming weeks with more details to follow!
The monday.com team
